历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 18030 → 17372 → 17131 → 22473 → 22070 respectively. Rankings slightly moved forward from 2021 to 2023 (by about 900 places), then significantly moved backward to 22473 in 2024 (by about 5342 places), and slightly recovered to 22070 in 2025. Over the past two years, rankings have overall moved backward by about 5000 places, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 22070. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province from 2021 to 2025 was 117, 117, 113, 113, 113 respectively, with 113 places in 2025. The 2026 plan increases to 140 places, an expansion of about 23.9% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion that will notably alleviate competition pressure, causing the minimum admission ranking number to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 89th, with recent rankings stable in the 84–92 range, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In the 2026 reputation monitoring, Chang'an University had no significant public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 83rd (rated as 'average'), with a comprehensive popularity of about 277,000, and short video exposure at a medium-low level. There have been no records of application gaps or cold surprises, and application attention remains stable. Chang'an University's only A- or above discipline is Transportation Engineering (A-), corresponding to core enrollment majors such as Road, Bridge and River-Crossing Engineering, Traffic Engineering, and Transportation, which have high industry recognition and stable appeal for related engineering majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have social popularity rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended', which are highly relevant to the university's engineering major clusters, helping maintain application heat. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Hubei Province is about 393,700, with an estimated 251,400 Physics Category candidates based on recent proportions, an increase of about 1,600 (+0.64%) compared to 2025 (249,800), slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in rankings from 2024–2025, the notable alleviation effect of the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 23.9%, the slight intensification of competition due to a 0.64% increase in Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province, and the combined impact of stable university reputation and high popularity of engineering majors, the expansion's effect of moving rankings backward (increasing numbers) dominates, but the increase in candidates and engineering popularity provide some offset. After minor adjustments considering the slight increase in candidate scale and engineering popularity support, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 25,033, with a range of 24,533–25,533.

- Computer Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Transportation

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Civil Engineering Class (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering)
- Materials Class (Materials Science and Engineering, Material Forming and Control Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices, etc.)

- Architecture Class (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture)
- Logistics Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 25,033, with a range of 24,533–25,533. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (24,533) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Automation Class, Electronic Information Class, Computer Class). Candidates with rankings around the middle of the range (about 25,000) are advised to primarily target Tier 2 majors (Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Class, Transportation Class), while also attempting Tier 1 sprint. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (25,533) are advised to secure Tier 3 majors as safety options (Civil Engineering Class, Materials Class, Business Administration Class), while also striving for lower-ranking Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 4179 → 4107 → 4105 → 4361 → 4516 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, they were basically stable around 4100, then moved back to 4361 in 2024, and further to 4516 in 2025. In the past two years, the cumulative backward shift is about 411 places, showing a slow backward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4516. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei was 3 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 2 in 2024, and significantly increased to 9 in 2025. The plan for 2026 is 11 students, an increase of about 22.2% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion that will significantly ease competition pressure and increase the minimum admission ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 89th, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. It is strong in engineering but has a small enrollment scale in liberal arts. In the 2026 reputation monitoring, no significant public opinion incidents were detected for Chang'an University. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd (rated as 'average'), indicating stable application attention with no obvious negative signals. Chang'an University's A- or above disciplines include only Transportation Engineering (A-), which is engineering and does not directly correspond to the History Category enrollment majors (Business Administration, Logistics Management, Ideological and Political Education, Administrative Management, Architecture). The support from advantageous liberal arts disciplines is relatively weak.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Hubei Gaokao is approximately 393,700. Based on recent proportions, the estimated number of History Category candidates is about 142,300, an increase of about 864 (+0.61%) compared to 2025 (141,400), indicating slightly intensified competition. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a western 211 university with liberal arts.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slow backward trend in rankings over the past two years, the significant easing effect of the approximately 22.2% enrollment expansion in 2026, the slight increase of 0.61% in History Category candidates in Hubei intensifying competition, and the weak support from advantageous liberal arts disciplines along with differentiated major popularity, the enrollment expansion's effect of pushing the ranking backward (increasing the number) is dominant. Taking into account the slight increase in candidate scale and the generally average popularity of liberal arts majors, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 5068, with a range of 4568–5568.
